rules: Every music and sfx cue must have source, author, license, commercial-use, and approval status.
Prototype audio may run in development but must not be production-approved.
Production-approved audio cannot have blocked, unknown, or placeholder commercial status.

music:stage-01.author: project prototype
music:stage-01.replacementPlan: Replace with final licensed stage loop or approve project-owned source files.

sfx:punch.author: project prototype
sfx:punch.replacementPlan: Replace or approve as project-owned impact sfx.

sfx:kick.author: project prototype
sfx:kick.replacementPlan: Replace or approve as project-owned impact sfx.

sfx:hit.author: project prototype
sfx:hit.replacementPlan: Replace or approve as project-owned hit-confirm sfx.

sfx:jump.author: project prototype
sfx:jump.replacementPlan: Replace or approve as project-owned movement sfx.

sfx:hurt.author: project prototype
sfx:hurt.replacementPlan: Replace or approve as project-owned reaction sfx.

sfx:guard.author: project prototype
sfx:guard.replacementPlan: Replace or approve as project-owned block sfx.

sfx:stageClear.author: project prototype
sfx:stageClear.replacementPlan: Replace or approve as project-owned stage-clear cue.
